description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in purple with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this synthetic leather bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Purple bag with a jute design that has one main zipped compartment that has an inner zipped pocket Two zipped compartments on either sides of the main compartment Two short handles woven through metallic loops for comfortable carrying One long adjustable and removable handle for carrying ease A fold over design with a concealed magnetic buttoned closure One zipped pocket at the back Material and Care Synthetic leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 29 cm Width: 37 cm Depth: 7 cm
